parameters.content:
# Global System Error Monitor
Acts as a clinic-wide safety net. 
If ANY automated workflow (like the Telegram Bot or Daily Report) crashes, this system intercepts the failure and immediately emails a detailed diagnostic report to the IT support team.

nodes.name: Global Error Trigger
nodes.notes: istens for crashes across all clinic workflows.

nodes.name: Format HTML Alert
nodes.notes: Extracts the exact error, failed node, and execution ID.

nodes.name: Email IT Support
nodes.notes: Dispatches a critical diagnostic email to admins.
